_comment: Template config for collector.py and snapshot_server.py. Copy to collector.config.json (gitignored) and fill in real values. No real hostnames/paths/repo names belong in this example file.
_comment_compose_projects: Maps an abstract environment label (used in tool output, see 02-contratto-tool.md) to the real Docker Compose project name on the host. Only projects listed here are ever reported.
_comment_backup_unit: systemd unit name of the backup timer/service (restic-based).
_comment_jobs: Static whitelist of ops scripts using the log+exit file convention. Allowed keys: deploy, restore-test, prepush-proof. Never derived from a directory scan.
_comment_github: Optional. If omitted, the ci section of the snapshot is empty and an entry is added to errors[]. Token is read from the OPS_CONSOLE_GH_PAT environment variable, never from this file.

github._comment_runner_repo: Optional. Set only when the self-hosted runner is registered under a different repository than 'repo' above, owned by the same 'owner' (e.g. a dedicated infra/runners repo). Workflow runs always come from 'repo'; only the runner status call uses 'runner_repo'. Falls back to 'repo' when omitted (current behavior). The PAT in OPS_CONSOLE_GH_PAT must have read access to both repositories when this is set.

_comment_output_path: Where collector.py writes snapshot.json (atomically) and snapshot_server.py reads it from.
_comment_stale_after_seconds: Used by the MCP server to flag a stale snapshot to the agent. Default 300 if omitted.
_comment_log_tail_lines: Number of trailing lines read from each job log file. Default 40 if omitted.
_comment_bind_address: snapshot_server.py only. Must be a specific address (e.g. the host's Tailscale IP), never 0.0.0.0 or empty.
